query: SELECT id, entity, status, current_stage, resume_page, progress, started_at, TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, started_at, COALESCE(finished_at, NOW())) as duration_sec FROM sync_logs WHERE section = 'Fastfone365' ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 8;
